title: Waxed Icons
description: Adds little wax icons next to your waxed block items!
body:
This is a simple QOL mod that adds a small icon on waxed blocks! This is done using Trimmed's client-tags, so if you want to add items to render the icon all you need to do is create a resource pack with `assets/waxedicons/trimmed/tags/item/renders_waxed_icon.json` and add the items to it like you would with a regular tag.

Requires [Trimmed](https://modrinth.com/mod/trimmed) (naturally)
